bio: I am a dedicated private chef and cook based in Bangkok with 3–5 years of experience. I take pride in providing reliable, professional service to every family. I speak English and Tagalog and other languages. My main skills include western, asian, baking. I am hardworking, trustworthy and easy to reach — feel free to contact me directly to discuss your needs.

bio: As a nanny I have over 15 yrs experience for baby care infant toddler and teens. I also caregiver for elderly. I'm a flexible and punctual person. Happy to hear from employee seeker's here. Thanks, Melani

My name is Palm, 21 years old, Thai. I live near Sirinthorn MRT and can commute easily. I have experience caring for children aged 1–9 years, including daycare training and part-time babysitting for several families. I focus on safety and maintaining daily routines. I also care for children in a big-sister style, to make them happy. I also have reviews from previous families and would be happy to share.
